{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "1836dfbb-5d85-4ecb-b535-7a432dab6bf8",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "import heapq\n",
    "from collections import defaultdict\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "d9153c2f-9765-4901-9d07-46774d56fa7e",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "file_path = \"astar_logistics_50_places.csv\"\n",
    "data = pd.read_csv(file_path)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "de221c1a-7c22-4ac7-9426-95b886edf254",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "data['Place'] = data['Place'].str.strip().str.upper()\n",
    "data['Connected_Node'] = data['Connected_Node'].str.strip().str.upper()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 7,
   "id": "a131f8cf-d299-4f78-a514-cd0a014abd75",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "graph = defaultdict(list)\n",
    "heuristic = {}\n",
    "for _, row in data.iterrows():\n",
    "    place = row['Place']\n",
    "    neighbor = row['Connected_Node']\n",
    "    cost = row['Road_Distance_km']\n",
    "    h_val = row['Heuristic_to_Agra']\n",
    "\n",
    "    graph[place].append((neighbor, cost))\n",
    "    graph[neighbor].append((place, cost))\n",
    "\n",
    "    heuristic[place] = h_val\n",
    "    heuristic[neighbor] = h_val"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 8,
   "id": "21926585-8ea3-4f7b-bf3a-68d05e4fa74a",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "def a_star(start, goal):\n",
    "    pq = []\n",
    "    heapq.heappush(pq, (0, start))\n",
    "    g_cost = {node: float('inf') for node in graph}\n",
    "    g_cost[start] = 0\n",
    "    parent = {start: None}\n",
    "    while pq:\n",
    "        current_f, current = heapq.heappop(pq)\n",
    "        if current == goal:\n",
    "            break\n",
    "        for neighbor, cost in graph[current]:\n",
    "            new_g = g_cost[current] + cost\n",
    "            if new_g < g_cost[neighbor]:\n",
    "                g_cost[neighbor] = new_g\n",
    "                f_cost = new_g + heuristic.get(neighbor, 0)\n",
    "\n",
    "                heapq.heappush(pq, (f_cost, neighbor))\n",
    "                parent[neighbor] = current\n",
    "    path = []\n",
    "    node = goal\n",
    "    if node not in parent:\n",
    "        return None, float('inf')\n",
    "    while node is not None:\n",
    "        path.append(node)\n",
    "        node = parent[node]\n",
    "    path.reverse()\n",
    "    return path, g_cost[goal]"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 9,
   "id": "55b0b6a4-144d-4645-a7d1-6800b84f8258",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "def evaluate(start_input, goal=\"AGRA\"):\n",
    "    start = start_input.strip().upper()\n",
    "    goal = goal.upper()\n",
    "    if start not in graph:\n",
    "        print(\"Invalid start city!\")\n",
    "        return\n",
    "    path, actual_distance = a_star(start, goal)\n",
    "    if path is None:\n",
    "        print(\"No path found from\", start, \"to\", goal)\n",
    "        return\n",
    "    h_start = heuristic.get(start, 0)\n",
    "    error = abs(actual_distance - h_start)\n",
    "    accuracy = (1 - (error / actual_distance)) * 100 if actual_distance != 0 else 0\n",
    "    print(\"Shortest Path:\", \" -> \".join(path))\n",
    "    print(\"Actual Distance:\", actual_distance, \"km\")\n",
    "    print(\"Heuristic:\", h_start, \"km\")\n",
    "    print(\"Error:\", error, \"km\")\n",
    "    print(\"Accuracy: {:.2f}%\".format(accuracy))\n",
    "    labels = ['Actual Distance', 'Heuristic']\n",
    "    values = [actual_distance, h_start]\n",
    "    plt.figure(figsize=(4,4))\n",
    "    plt.bar(labels, values)\n",
    "    plt.title(\"Actual vs Heuristic Distance\")\n",
    "    plt.ylabel(\"Distance (km)\")\n",
    "    plt.show()\n",
    "    plt.figure(figsize=(4,4))\n",
    "    plt.bar(['Accuracy'], [accuracy])\n",
    "    plt.ylim(0, 100)\n",
    "    plt.title(\"Accuracy (%)\")\n",
    "    plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 11,
   "id": "e75e113f-d079-493d-bb6e-05e1a2846de2",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [

     "name": "stdin",
     "output_type": "stream",

      "Enter Start City:  Muzaffarnagar\n"
     ]
    },

     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Shortest Path: MUZAFFARNAGAR -> MEERUT -> GHAZIABAD -> DELHI -> NOIDA -> ALIGARH -> MATHURA -> AGRA\n",
      "Actual Distance: 395 km\n",
      "Heuristic: 260 km\n",
      "Error: 135 km\n",
      "Accuracy: 65.82%\n"
     ]
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 400x400 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {

      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 400x400 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "start_node = input(\"Enter Start City: \")\n",
    "evaluate(start_node)"
   ]
  },
